sections.heading: If we received your application before July 31
items: You need to give your biometrics if you’re between 14 and 79 years old, even if you gave them to us in the past in support of an application for a visitor visa, study or work permit.

sections.heading: If we received your application on or after July 31
items: You don’t need to give your biometrics if :
You can find out if your biometrics are still valid and when they expire by using the Check Status Tool .
How do I know if my application was received before July 31, 2018?
bullets: you already gave them in the past in support of an application for a visitor visa, study or work permit, and
your biometrics are still valid.

sections.heading: If you need to give your biometrics
Online or paper application
items: After you submit your application, we’ll send you a letter that says so and where you can go. You’ll have up to 30 days to go in person to an official biometrics collection service location.
bullets: If you applied online The letter will go to your account message box within 24 hours of applying. You’ll get an email to let you know that you have a new message.
The letter will go to your account message box within 24 hours of applying. You’ll get an email to let you know that you have a new message.

If you applied by mail The letter will get to you by mail about two weeks after we get your application. The timing of your letter depends on various factors including the speed of your postal service.
The letter will get to you by mail about two weeks after we get your application. The timing of your letter depends on various factors including the speed of your postal service.

sections.heading: If you applied at a Visa Application Centre (VAC)
items: If you submitted a paper application at a VAC, you may have given your biometrics at that time. If you didn’t and you need to give biometrics, you’ll get a letter that tells you to pay the biometrics fee. Once the fee is paid, you’ll get another letter that tells you that you need to give biometrics.

If you applied online at a VAC, you’ll get a letter that tells you that you need to give biometrics. This letter will go to your account message box within 24 hours of applying. You’ll get an email to let you know that you have a new message. Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.
Find out more about biometrics : who is exempt, how often you need to give them, how to give them and where to give them .

sections.heading: If we received your application before July 31
items: You don’t need to give your biometrics.

sections.heading: If we received your application on or after July 31
items: As a lawful permanent resident of the U.S. with a valid green card, you need to give your biometrics if :
If you gave your biometrics in the past and they’re still valid , you don’t need to give your biometrics for your application.
You can find out if your biometrics are still valid and when they expire by using the Check Status Tool .
How do I know if my application was received before July 31, 2018?
bullets: you applied for a study or work permit, or for permanent residence,
you’re between 14 and 79 years old, and
you didn’t give your biometrics in the past.

sections.heading: For online or paper applications
bullets: You can only give your biometrics after you get a letter from us that tells you what to do.
To get this letter, pay the biometrics fee when you submit your application.

sections.heading: If you apply at a Visa Application Centre (VAC)
items: Find out more about biometrics:
bullets: You can give your biometrics when you submit a paper application at a VAC, if you booked an appointment.

If you decide to apply online at a VAC, you’ll have to wait to get the letter that tells you that you need to give biometrics. Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.
Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.

sections.heading: To visit Canada as a tourist only
items: You don’t need to give your biometrics if you plan to visit only .
You do need to apply for an eTA.

sections.heading: To study or work in Canada
items: You need to give your biometrics if you’re between 14 and 79 years old and you apply for a study or work permit.
If you plan to study for 6 months or less, you don’t need a study permit and you don’t need to give biometrics.
If you’re a lawful U.S. permanent resident with a valid green card , you don’t need to give biometrics to only visit Canada.

sections.heading: For online or paper applications
bullets: You can only give your biometrics after you get a letter from us that tells you what to do.
To get this letter, pay the biometrics fee when you submit your application.

sections.heading: If you apply at a Visa Application Centre (VAC)
items: Find out more about biometrics : who is exempt, how often you need to give them, how to give them and where to give them .
bullets: You need to book an appointment in advance to give your biometrics.
You can give your biometrics when you submit a paper application at a VAC, if you booked an appointment.

If you decide to apply online at a VAC, you’ll have to wait to get the letter that tells you that you need to give biometrics. Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.
Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.

sections.heading: For online or paper applications
bullets: You can only give your biometrics after you get a letter from us that tells you what to do.

sections.heading: If you apply at a Visa Application Centre (VAC)
items: Find out more about biometrics : who is exempt, how often you need to give them, how to give them and where to give them .
bullets: You need to book an appointment in advance to give your biometrics.
You can give your biometrics when you submit a paper application at a VAC, if you booked an appointment.

If you decide to apply online at a VAC, you’ll have to wait to get the letter that tells you that you need to give biometrics. Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.
Once you have this letter, you can return to the VAC to give your biometrics.

sections.heading: If you plan to visit Canada for 6 months or less
items: You should apply for an eTA , not a visitor visa.

sections.heading: If you plan to visit Canada for more than 6 months
items: When you arrive at the Canadian port of entry, let the border services officer know that you want to stay in Canada longer than 6 months . The officer may authorize you to stay longer to cover the planned purpose of your visit.

If you’re a parent or grandparent of a Canadian citizen or permanent resident of Canada and you’re outside Canada, you may be eligible to apply for a super visa to stay in Canada for up to 2 years at a time.

sections.heading: If you plan to study, work, or live permanently in Canada
items: Starting December 31, 2018 , you need to give your biometrics when you submit a new application for:
bullets: a study permit
a work permit
permanent residence

sections.heading: If you plan to visit Canada only
items: You don’t need to give your biometrics if you plan to visit only (even after December 31, 2018).
Based on your selection, you’re a visa-exempt traveller. You don’t need to apply for a visitor visa. You should apply for an eTA .

If you plan on staying longer than 6 months , let the border services officer know when you arrive at the Canadian port of entry. The officer may authorize you to stay longer to cover the planned purpose of your visit.
If you’re a parent or grandparent of a Canadian citizen or permanent resident of Canada, you may be eligible to apply for a super visa to stay in Canada for up to 2 years at a time.

sections.heading: If you plan to study, work or live permanently in Canada
items: Starting December 31, 2018 , you need to give your biometrics when you submit a new application for a study or work permit or for permanent residence.

sections.heading: If you plan only to visit Canada with an ordinary passport
items: You should apply for an electronic travel authorization if
You don’t need to give your biometrics, even after December 31, 2018.

If you plan on staying longer than 6 months , let the border services officer know when you arrive at the Canadian port of entry. The officer may authorize you to stay longer to cover the planned purpose of your visit.
If you’re a parent or grandparent of a Canadian citizen or permanent resident of Canada, you may be eligible to apply for a super visa to stay in Canada for up to 2 years at a time.
bullets: you’re travelling with a passport issued by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs that includes a personal identification number
you plan only to visit

sections.heading: If you plan only to visit Canada with another passport
items: You need a visitor visa if you’re travelling with a passport issued by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs that does not have a personal identification number.
Starting December 31, 2018 , you need to give your biometrics when you apply for a visa, even if you plan only to visit .
Find out more about biometrics , who is exempt, how often you need to give them, how to give them and where to give them .

sections.heading: If you apply for permanent residence
items: You need to give biometrics.

If you’re between 14 and 79 years old, you need to give your fingerprints and photo for all permanent residence applications, even if you already gave us your biometrics and they’re still valid. This includes:
You need to make an appointment to give biometrics.
Find out more about biometrics:
bullets: family class
economic class
persons with refugee, protected person, or asylum status in Canada
Steps to give your biometrics
Where to give biometrics
Biometrics facts

sections.heading: If you apply for a visitor visa, study or work permit
items: You don’t need to give your biometrics if they’re still valid.
You can find out if your biometrics are still valid and when they expire by using the Check Status Tool .

sections.heading: If you applied online
items: The date you submitted your application is available on your account screen. See the “Date submitted” column of the section “View the applications you submitted”.

sections.heading: If you applied on paper
items: If you do need to submit your biometrics, you’ll get a letter from us a few weeks after we receive your application.
bullets: If you used a courier service , you can get the date that your application was received from the courier’s tracking information service.
If you used regular mail , you will need to contact the location where you sent your application.
